mapper.select: select EI01_SEQ.nextval as key from dual
select ename from examinfo where id = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select ei.id as id, ei.ename as ename, ei.cid as cid, ei.cname as cname, ei.code as code, ei.schoolyear as schoolyear, ei.term as term, to_char(ei.begindate, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') as begindate, to_char(ei.enddate, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') as enddate, ei.time as time, ei.lock_before as lockBefore, ei.lock_after as lockAfter, ei.total as total, ei.scount as scount, ei.finish as finish, ei.printcount as printcount, ei.subjectsum as subjectsum, ei.type as type, ei.remark2t as remark2t, ei.remark2s as remark2s, ei.e_remark2s as e_remark2s, ei.firstpsw as firstpsw, ei.secondpsw as secondpsw, ei.scheckway as scheckway, ei.testtimeset as testtimeset, ei.randomanswer as randomanswer, ei.correctway as correctway, ei.getanswer as getanswer, ei.proportion as proportion, ei.period as period, ei.testway as testway, ei.missionnum as missionnum, ei.forbid_isverified as isverified, ei.forbid_num as forbidNum, ei.forbid_before as forbidBefore, ei.answersequence as answersequence, ei.bid as bid, ei.cpid as cpid, ei.aorb as aorb, ei.autotest as autotest, ei.sidverify as sidverify, ei.invigilatorids as invigilatorids, ei.PATROLIDS as patrolids, ei.courseteacher as courseteacher, ei.firstverifyopinion as firstverifyopinion, t1.real_name as firstverifyteacher, ei.lastverifyopinion as lastverifyopinion, t2.real_name as lastverifyteacher, ei.teacherid as teacherid, tea.real_name as teachername, ei.tel as tel, ei.state as state, ei.venues as venues, t.name as termname, ei.firstverify as firstverify, ei.lastverify as lastverify, ei.create_time as createtime, ei.release as release, ei.mobile as mobile, ei.facetime as facetime, ei.facefail as facefail, et.name as examtype, u.name as unitname, ei.forecast_averagescore as forecast_averagescore, ei.score as score, ei.isUnion as isUnion, ei.editor_switch as editor_switch, nvl(ei.random,0) as random, ei.answersheet as answersheet, s.name as examtime, ei.state, ei.restart, ei.handintimelimit, ei.switch_out_limit, ei.tasknum_switch, ei.analysis_comment as analysis_comment, ei.passstate as passstate from term t,examinfo ei left join teacher tea on tea.id = ei.teacherid left join teacher t1 on ei.FIRSTVERIFYID=t1.id left join teacher t2 on ei.LASTVERIFYID=t2.id left join examtype et on ei.type=et.id left join unit u on u.id = ei.unitid left join system_time s on s.id=ei.time where ei.term = t.id and ei.id = #{ei_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select ei.id,ei.type from examinfo ei where ei.type = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select ce.cid,ce.etid,ce.etname from course_examtype ce where ce.etid = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT EI01_SEQ.currval FROM DUAL
insert into examinfo (id, ename, cid, cname, forbid_before, schoolyear, term, begindate, enddate, time, lock_before, lock_after, total, finish, printcount, teacherid, tel, invigilatorids, patrolids, subjectsum, type, aorb, bid, remark2t, remark2s, e_remark2s, firstpsw, secondpsw, scheckway, testtimeset, randomanswer, correctway, getanswer, proportion, period, testway, missionnum, forbid_isverified, forbid_num, code, answersequence, state, testtime, submit4verify, firstverify, lastverify, firstverifyid, lastverifyid, chosen, depid, unitid, teachername, autotest, sidverify, create_time, isUnion, handintimelimit) select ei01_seq.nextval, ename, cid, cname, forbid_before, schoolyear, term, begindate, enddate, time, lock_before, lock_after, total, finish, printcount, teacherid, tel, invigilatorids, patrolids, 0, type, 1, #{aid}, remark2t, remark2s, e_remark2s, firstpsw, secondpsw, scheckway, testtimeset, randomanswer, correctway, getanswer, proportion, period, testway, missionnum, forbid_isverified, forbid_num, code, answersequence, state, testtime, submit4verify, firstverify, lastverify, firstverifyid, lastverifyid, chosen, depid, unitid, teachername, 0, sidverify, #{createTime}, #{isUnion}, handintimelimit from examinfo ei where ei.id = #{aid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: select t.grade as gid, t.specialtyid as sid, g.name as gname, s.name as sname, u.name as uname from examobject t left join grade g on t.grade = g.id left join specialty s on t.specialtyid = s.id left join unit u on u.id = s.unitid where t.eid = #{ei_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by nlssort(s.name,'NLS_SORT=SCHINESE_PINYIN_M')

select distinct u.name as uname from unit u,specialty s where u.id=s.unitid and s.id in
#{item,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert:
insert into examobject (eid, grade, specialtyid)
select #{ei_id}, #{item.grade}, #{item.specialty} from dual
insert into examobject (eid, grade, specialtyid, classid) select #{bid}, grade, specialtyid, classid from examobject eo where eo.eid = #{aid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update:
update examinfo
bid = #{bid},
cpid = #{cpid},
where id = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert:
insert into exampaper_questionparam (eid, qtid, thid, thlevel, num,iscon) select #{ei_id},temp.* from (select eq.qtid_q,eq.theme2id, 2, count(*),eq.iscon from exampaper_question_db eq where eq.ismain=0 and eq.theme2id is not null and eq.eid = #{ei_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR} group by eq.qtid_q,eq.theme2id,eq.iscon union all
select eq.qtid_q,eq.theme1id, 1, count(*),eq.iscon from exampaper_question_db eq where eq.ismain=0 and eq.theme2id is null and eq.eid = #{ei_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR} group by eq.qtid_q,eq.theme1id,eq.iscon) temp
mapper.select: select t1.qtid, t1.thid, t1.thlevel, t1.num, t1.iscon , t.cid,t.pid from exampaper_questionparam t1,theme t where t.id = t1.thid and t1.eid = #{ei_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select eq.qtid, eq.thid, eq.thlevel, eq.num, eq.iscon , teq.cid,teq.pid from exampaper_questionparam eq left join theme teq on eq.thid = teq.id where exists (select * from exampaper_questionparam eq2 left join theme teq2 on eq2.thid = teq2.id where eq2.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and eq2.qtid = eq.qtid and teq2.pid = eq.thid and teq2.tlevel = 2) and eq.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and eq.thlevel = 1
mapper.delete: delete from exampaper_questionparam t where t.eid = #{ei_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
delete from exampaper_questiontype t where t.eid = #{ei_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
delete from examinfo ei where ei.id = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
delete from examobject eo where eo.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: select res.eid,res.qtid,res.cid,res.qcount,qt.qtname,qt.e_qtname,qt.qtdesc,qt.e_qtdesc,res.atid,qt.iscon,qt.qtorder,qt.sxb, qt.xxdf,qt.mediaset from ( select #{ei_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR} as eid, epq.cid,epq.qtid as qtid, epq.atid as atid,count(epq.qid) as qcount,epq.qtid_q from dual, exampaper_question_db epq where epq.eid = #{ei_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and epq.ismain = 0 group by epq.qtid,epq.cid,epq.qtid_q,epq.atid) res left join course_questiontype qt on res.qtid_q=qt.qtid and res.cid=qt.cid
mapper.update: update exampaper_question_db eq set eq.qtid=#{nqtid} where eq.qtid=#{qtid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and eq.cid=#{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and eq.eid=#{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert:
insert into exampaper_questiontype (eid, qtid, questioncount, answertime, qtname, e_qtname, qtdesc, e_qtdesc, atid, iscon, qtorder, sxb, xxdf, mediaset)
#{item.EID}, #{item.QTID}, #{item.QCOUNT}, -1, #{item.QTNAME},
'' #{item.E_QTNAME} ,
'' #{item.QTDESC} ,
'' #{item.E_QTDESC} , #{item.ATID}, #{item.ISCON}, #{item.QTORDER},
'' #{item.SXB} ,
0 #{item.XXDF} ,
0 #{item.MEDIASET} ,

insert into exampaper_questiontype (eid, qtid, questioncount,answertime,qtorder,qtname,qtdesc,e_qtname,e_qtdesc,atid,iscon,sxb,xxdf,mediaset) select #{ei_id}, eqt.qtid,count(eq.qid) as questioncount,eqt.answertime,eqt.qtorder, eqt.qtname,eqt.qtdesc,eqt.e_qtname,eqt.e_qtdesc,eqt.atid, eqt.iscon,eqt.sxb,eqt.xxdf,eqt.mediaset from exampaper_questiontype eqt, exampaper_question_db eq where eqt.eid = #{aid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and eq.eid = #{ei_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and nvl(substr(eq.qtid,0,instr(eq.qtid,'_')-1),eq.qtid) = nvl(substr(eqt.qtid,0,instr(eqt.qtid,'_')-1),eqt.qtid) and eq.ismain = 0 group by eqt.eid, eqt.qtid, eqt.answertime, eqt.qtorder, eqt.qtname, eqt.qtdesc, eqt.e_qtname, eqt.e_qtdesc, eqt.atid, eqt.iscon,eqt.sxb,eqt.xxdf,eqt.mediaset
mapper.select: select eq.qtid, eq.questioncount, eq.score, eq.answertime,(eq.qttime/eq.questioncount)as qtime,eq.qtorder,eq.qtname as qtname, eq.e_qtname as e_qtname,eq.qtdesc as qtdesc,eq.e_qtdesc as e_qtdesc,eq.iscon,eq.atid,eq.xxdf,eq.mediaset from exampaper_questiontype eq where eq.eid = #{ei_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by eq.qtorder
select eq.qtid, eq.questioncount, eq.score, eq.answertime, eq.qtorder,eq.qtname as qtname,eq.iscon,eq.eid from studentexam_questiontype eq where eq.eid = #{ei_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by eq.qtorder

select t.eid,t.qid as qid,t.cid as cid,t.ismain as ismain,t.mqid as mqid,t.iscon as iscon,t.answerid as answerid,t.atid from EXAMPAPER_QUESTION_DB t,EXAMPAPER_QUESTIONTYPE x where t.eid = x.eid and t.qtid = x.qtid and t.eid = #{ei_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by x.qtorder,t.cid,t.qorder,t.qid
mapper.update: update exampaper_questiontype eqt set eqt.qttime = (select sum(eq.answertime_bachelor) as qttime from exampaper_question_db eq where eq.eid = #{ei_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and eqt.qtid = eq.qtid and eq.ismain = 0 group by eq.qtid) where eqt.eid = #{ei_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update exampaper_questiontype
score = #{qtscore}, answertime = #{qttime},
qtorder = #{qtindex},
where eid = #{ei_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and qtid = #{qtid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update exampaper_questionparam t set t.num = (select count(eq.qid) from exampaper_question_db eq where t.thid = (select decode(trim(t.thlevel), 1, eq.theme1id, eq.theme2id) from dual) and eq.qtid = t.qtid and eq.eid = t.eid and eq.ismain = '0' and eq.eid = #{ei_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) where t.eid = #{ei_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.delete: delete from exampaper_questionparam t where t.num=0 and t.eid = #{ei_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
delete exampaper_questiontype where questioncount = 0 and eid = #{ei_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: select eq.qid, eq.th, eq.iscon, eq.ismain, eq.content, eq.qtid, eq.atid, eq.answerid, eq.theme1id, eq.theme2id, eq.theme3id, eq.score, eq.mqid, eq.filepath from exampaper_question_db eq where eq.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by eq.th

select eqt.qtid, eqt.qtname, eqt.e_qtname, eqt.qtorder, eqt.qttime, eqt.qtdesc, eqt.e_qtdesc, eqt.xxdf, eqt.mediaset from exampaper_questiontype eqt where eqt.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by eqt.qtorder
select a.id as aid, a.content as acontent, a.atid as atid, a.content_6 as content_6 from answer_db a where a.qid = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by a.id

select a.aid as aid, a.content as acontent, a.atid as atid, a.content_6 as content_6, a.qid as qid, a.eid as eid, a.score as score from exampaper_answer a where a.qid = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and a.eid=#{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by a.aid
select count(distinct eq.theme1id) as t1count, count(distinct eq.theme2id) as t2count, count(distinct eq.theme3id) as t3count from exampaper_question_db eq where eq.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select distinct cd.did,cd.dname,NVL(temp.NUM,0) as num, NVL(temp.SCORE,0) as score from course_difficulty cd left join(select sum(a.num) as num, min(a.did) as did, sum(a.score) as score from (select count(eq.qid) as num, min(eq.difficultyid_bachelor) as did, count(eq.qid) * min(eq.score) as score from exampaper_question_db eq where eq.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and eq.ismain = 0 group by eq.difficultyid_bachelor, eq.score) a group by a.did) temp on cd.did=temp.did where cd.cid in
#{item,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select distinct ck.kid,ck.kname,NVL(temp.NUM,0) as num, NVL(temp.SCORE,0) as score from course_knowledge ck left join(select sum(a.num) as num, min(a.kid) as kid, sum(a.score) as score from (select count(eq.qid) as num, min(eq.knowledgeid_bachelor) as kid, count(eq.qid) * min(eq.score) as score from exampaper_question_db eq where eq.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and eq.ismain = 0 group by eq.knowledgeid_bachelor, eq.score) a group by a.kid) temp on ck.kid=temp.KID where ck.cid in
#{item,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select distinct cc.coid,cc.coname, NVL(temp.NUM,0) as num, NVL(temp.SCORE,0) as score from course_cognition cc left join (select sum(a.num) as num, min(a.coid) as coid, sum(a.score) as score from (select count(eq.qid) as num, min(eq.cognitionid_bachelor) as coid, count(eq.qid) * min(eq.score) as score from exampaper_question_db eq where eq.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and eq.ismain = 0 group by eq.cognitionid_bachelor, eq.score) a group by a.coid) temp on cc.coid = temp.coid where cc.cid in
#{item,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select eqt.qtid,eqt.atid as atid,eqt.qtname, NVL(temp.NUM,0) as num, NVL(temp.SCORE,0) as score from exampaper_questiontype eqt left join (select sum(a.num) as num, min(a.qtid) as qtid, sum(a.score) as score from (select count(eq.qid) as num, min(eq.qtid) as qtid, count(eq.qid) * min(eq.score) as score from exampaper_question_db eq where eq.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and eq.ismain = 0 group by eq.qtid, eq.score) a group by a.qtid) temp on eqt.qtid = temp.qtid where eqt.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select a.qtid,qt.atid as atid,qt.qtname as qtname,a.num, NVL(a.score,0) as score from (select count(eq.qid) as num, min(eq.qtid) as qtid, count(eq.qid) * min(eq.score) as score from exampaper_question_db eq where eq.ismain = 0 and eq.qtid in('100','101','102','103') and eq.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} group by eq.qtid, eq.score) a left join exampaper_questiontype qt on qt.qtid=a.qtid
select t.id, t.name from teacher t where t.unitid = #{unitID,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.delete: delete from examobject eo where eo.eid = #{ei_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update:

tel = #{tel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ename = #{ename,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
subjectsum = #{subjectsum,jdbcType=INTEGER},

enddate = #{enddate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
time = #{time,jdbcType=INTEGER},
lock_before = #{lockBefore,jdbcType=INTEGER},
lock_after = #{lockAfter,jdbcType=INTEGER},
total = #{total,jdbcType=INTEGER},
printcount = #{printcount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
type = #{type,jdbcType=INTEGER},
remark2t = #{remark2t,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
remark2s = #{remark2s,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
e_remark2s = #{e_remark2s,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
scheckway = #{scheckway,jdbcType=INTEGER},
testtimeset = #{testtimeset,jdbcType=INTEGER},
randomanswer = #{randomanswer,jdbcType=INTEGER},
correctway = #{correctway,jdbcType=INTEGER},
getanswer = #{getanswer,jdbcType=INTEGER},
proportion = #{proportion,jdbcType=INTEGER},
period = #{period,jdbcType=INTEGER},
testway = #{testway,jdbcType=INTEGER},
missionnum = #{missionnum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
answersequence = #{answerSequence,jdbcType=INTEGER},
forbid_before = #{forbidBefore,jdbcType=INTEGER},
forbid_num = #{forbidNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
forbid_isverified = #{isVerified,jdbcType=INTEGER},
sidverify = #{sidverify,jdbcType=INTEGER},
tasknum_switch = #{tasknum_switch,jdbcType=INTEGER},
facetime = #{facetime,jdbcType=INTEGER},
facefail = #{facefail,jdbcType=INTEGER},
invigilatorids = #{invigilatorids,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PATROLIDS = #{patrolids,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
courseTeacher = #{courseTeacher,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
state = #{state,jdbcType=INTEGER},
submit4verify = #{submit4verify,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
submit4verifyid = #{submit4verifyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
submit4verifyname = #{submit4verifyname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
firstverify = #{firstverify,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
firstverifyid = #{firstverifyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
firstverifyname = #{firstverifyname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
firstverifyopinion = #{firstverifyopinion,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
lastverify = #{lastverify,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
lastverifyid = #{lastverifyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
lastverifyname = #{lastverifyname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
lastverifyopinion = #{lastverifyopinion,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
verifyfail = #{verifyfail,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
verifyfailid = #{verifyfailid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
verifyfailname = #{verifyfailname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
chosen = #{chosen,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
firstpsw = #{firstpsw,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
secondpsw = #{secondpsw,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
venues = #{venues,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
release = #{release,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
isUnion = #{isUnion,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
editor_switch = #{editor_switch,jdbcType=INTEGER},
mobile = #{mobile,jdbcType=INTEGER},
answersheet = #{answersheet,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
handintimelimit = #{handInTimeLimit,jdbcType=INTEGER},
switch_out_limit = #{switch_out_limit,jdbcType=INTEGER},
autotest = #{autotest, jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{ei_id,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}

update exampaper_questiontype qt
qt.e_qtname = #{e_qtname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
qt.qtdesc = #{qtdesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
qt.e_qtdesc = #{e_qtdesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
qt.sxb = #{sxb,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
qt.xxdf = #{xxdf,jdbcType=INTEGER},
qt.mediaSet = #{mediaSet,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where qt.qtid = #{qtid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and qt.eid=#{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: select distinct * from (select t1.id, t1.name,t1.torder from exampaper_question_db eq, theme t1 where eq.theme1id = t1.id and t1.tlevel = 1 and eq.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) order by torder
select cd.name as dname,cd.id as did from exampaper_question_db eq,difficulty cd where eq.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and eq.difficultyid_bachelor = cd.id group by cd.name,cd.id
select ck.name as kname, ck.id as kid from exampaper_question_db eq, knowledge ck where eq.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and eq.KNOWLEDGEID_BACHELOR = ck.id group by ck.name, ck.id
select eq.qtid, eq.questioncount, eq.score, eq.answertime, eq.qtorder,eq.qtname,eq.iscon,eq.xxdf from exampaper_questiontype eq where eq.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by eq.qtorder

select co.coname as coname, co.coid as coid from exampaper_question_db eq, course_cognition co where eq.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and eq.COGNITIONID_BACHELOR = co.coid and eq.cid = co.cid group by co.coname, co.coid

select epq.qid as qid, epq.iscon as qtiscon, epq.mqid as mqid, epq.ismain as ismain, epq.iscon as iscon, epq.answertime_bachelor as time, epq.score as score, epq.qtid as qtype, epq.answerid as answerid, epq.content as content, t1.name as t1name, t2.name as t2name, t3.name as t3name, epq.qorder as qorder, epq.filepath as filepath, epq.th as th, epq.atid as atid, a.aid as aid, a.content as acontent, a.content_6 as acontent_6 from exampaper_question_db epq left join exampaper_answer a on epq.qid = a.qid and epq.eid=a.eid left join theme t1 on epq.theme1id = t1.id left join theme t2 on epq.theme2id = t2.id left join theme t3 on epq.theme3id = t3.id left join exampaper_questiontype t on t.eid = epq.eid and t.qtid = epq.qtid where epq.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by epq.qorder,a.aid

select t.qtid as qtid, t.atid as atid, t.qtdesc as qtdesc, t.qtname as qtname, t.iscon as iscon, t.score as qscore, t.questioncount as qcount, t.score * t.questioncount as score from exampaper_questiontype t where t.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and t.questioncount > 0 order by t.qtorder
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO EXAMPAPER_QUESTIONPARAM (eid, qtid, thid, thlevel, num, iscon) SELECT #{bid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS eid, qtid, thid, thlevel, num, iscon FROM EXAMPAPER_QUESTIONPARAM WHERE eid = #{aid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

INSERT INTO EXAMPAPER_QUESTIONTYPE (eid,qtid,questioncount,score,answertime,qtorder,teacherid,qtname,qtdesc,atid,iscon,sxb,e_qtname,e_qtdesc, qttime,xxdf,mediaset)
SELECT #{item.bid} AS eid, t.qtid AS qtid, t.questioncount AS questioncount, t.score AS score, t.answertime AS answertime, #{item.qtorder} AS qtorder, t.teacherid AS teacherid, t.qtname AS qtname, t.qtdesc AS qtdesc, t.atid AS atid, t.iscon AS iscon, t.sxb AS sxb, t.e_qtname AS e_qtname, t.e_qtdesc AS e_qtdesc, t.qttime AS qttime, t.xxdf AS xxdf, t.mediaset AS mediaset FROM EXAMPAPER_QUESTIONTYPE t WHERE t.eid = #{item.aid} AND t.qtid = #{item.qtid}

INSERT INTO EXAMPAPER_QUESTION_DB (eid,qid,iscon,mqid,ismain,qtid,content,answerid,answerexplain,answertime,realdifficulty,distinction,standard_deviation, difficultyid,knowledgeid,sourceid,cognitionid,arrangeid,theme1id,theme2id,theme3id,filepath,answertime_bachelor, difficultyid_bachelor,knowledgeid_bachelor,cognitionid_bachelor,qorder,score,state,cid,verifyid,time4verify,version, creatorid,updatorid,num,scount,th,atid,qtid_q,yl_1,use_time)
SELECT #{item.bid} AS eid, q.qid AS qid, q.iscon AS iscon, q.mqid AS mqid, q.ismain AS ismain, q.qtid AS qtid, q.content AS content, q.answerid AS answerid, q.answerexplain AS answerexplain, q.answertime AS answertime, q.realdifficulty AS realdifficulty, q.distinction AS distinction, q.standard_deviation AS standard_deviation, q.difficultyid AS difficultyid, q.knowledgeid AS knowledgeid, q.sourceid AS sourceid, q.cognitionid AS cognitionid, q.arrangeid AS arrangeid, q.theme1id AS theme1id, q.theme2id AS theme2id, q.theme3id AS theme3id, q.filepath AS filepath, q.answertime_bachelor AS answertime_bachelor, q.difficultyid_bachelor AS difficultyid_bachelor, q.knowledgeid_bachelor AS knowledgeid_bachelor, q.cognitionid_bachelor AS cognitionid_bachelor, #{item.qorder} AS qorder, q.score AS score, q.state AS state, q.cid AS cid, q.verifyid AS verifyid, q.time4verify AS time4verify, q.version AS version, q.creatorid AS creatorid, q.updatorid AS updatorid, q.num AS num, q.scount AS scount, #{item.th} AS th, q.atid AS atid, q.qtid_q AS qtid_q, q.yl_1 AS yl_1, q.use_time AS use_time FROM EXAMPAPER_QUESTION_DB q WHERE q.eid = #{item.aid} AND q.qid = #{item.qid}
mapper.select: select qt.qtid, qt.atid, qt.qtname, qt.qtdesc, qt.iscon, nvl(qt.score,0) as qscore, nvl(t.score,0) as score, t.qcount, ROUND(t.qscore,2) as q_score from exampaper_questiontype qt left join (select eq.qtid, sum(eq.score) as score, count(*) as qcount,avg(eq.score) as qscore from exampaper_question_db eq where eq.ismain = 0 and eq.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} group by eq.qtid) t on t.qtid = qt.qtid where qt.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by qt.qtorder
select eq.score, count(*) as qcount from exampaper_question_db eq where eq.ismain = 0 and eq.qtid=#{qtid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and eq.eid=#{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} group by eq.score order by qcount desc
select count(*) as qnum, eq.qtid from exampaper_question_db eq where eq.ismain = 0 and eq.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} group by eq.qtid
mapper.delete: delete from exampaper_question_db t where t.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
delete from exampaper_questionparam t where t.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
delete from exampaper_questiontype t where t.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: update examinfo ei set ei.bid = null where ei.bid = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: select NVL(SUM(score) ,0) as score from exampaper_question_db t where t.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and t.ismain = 0
mapper.update: update exampaper_question_db q set (q.score, q.answertime_bachelor) = (select t.score, t.answertime from (select sum(eq.score) as score, sum(eq.answertime_bachelor) as answertime, eq.mqid from exampaper_question_db eq where eq.iscon = 1 and eq.ismain = 0 and eq.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} group by mqid) t where t.mqid = q.qid) where q.ismain=1 and q.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert: insert into exampaper_course(eid,cid) select #{bid},cid from exampaper_course where eid=#{aid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: {call UPDATE_COURSE_PAGECOUNT( #{cid,mode=IN})}
mapper.insert: insert into exampaper_course(eid,cid) select #{cpid},cid from exampaper_course where eid=#{aid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: select cid from exampaper_course where eid=#{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select sum(eq.answertime_bachelor) as qttime from exampaper_question_db eq where eq.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and eq.ismain = 0
select name as name from system_time where id = #{stid}

select NVL(q.num, eq.num) as usetime, count(eq.num) as num ,sum(eq.score) as score from exampaper_question_db eq left join question_db q on q.id = eq.qid where eq.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and eq.ismain = 0 group by NVL(q.num, eq.num) order by NVL(q.num, eq.num)
select eq.qid,nvl(eq.score,0) as score,nvl(eq.realdifficulty,0) as realdifficulty,eq.difficultyid_bachelor as ygdiff from exampaper_question_db eq where eq.ismain=0 and eq.eid=#{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: update examinfo ei set ei.cid = #{cid} where ei.id = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
update examinfo ei set ei.state = 0, ei.autotest = 0 where ei.id = #{ei_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert:
insert into exampaper_question_db(qid,cid,iscon,mqid,ismain,answerid,verifyid,time4verify,answerexplain,answertime,realdifficulty, distinction,standard_deviation,difficultyid,knowledgeid,qtid,sourceid,cognitionid,arrangeid,theme1id,theme2id,theme3id,filepath,content, answertime_bachelor,difficultyid_bachelor,knowledgeid_bachelor,cognitionid_bachelor,eid,state,creatorid,num,score,scount,qorder,atid,qtid_q)
select q.id,q.cid,q.qtiscon,q.mqid,q.ismain,q.answerid,q.verifyid,q.time4verify,q.answerexplain,q.answertime, q.realdifficulty,q.distinction,q.standard_deviation,q.difficultyid,q.knowledgeid,q.qtid||'_'||q.atid||'_'||qt.iscon,q.sourceid,q.cognitionid, q.arrangeid,q.theme1id,q.theme2id,q.theme3id,q.filepath,q.content, nvl((select answertime from exampaper_questiontype eqt where eqt.qtid = (select q.qtid||'_'||q.atid||'_'||cqt.iscon from question_db q,course_questiontype cqt where q.id = #{item.qid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and cqt.cid = q.cid and cqt.qtid = q.qtid) and eqt.answertime != -1 and eqt.eid = #{ei_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}),q.answertime_bachelor), q.difficultyid_bachelor, q.knowledgeid_bachelor,q.cognitionid_bachelor,#{ei_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR},q.state,q.creatorid,q.num,eq.score,q.count,#{item.qorder},q.atid,q.qtid from question_db q left join course_questiontype qt on qt.qtid=q.qtid and qt.cid=q.cid left join exampaper_questiontype eq on eq.qtid=q.qtid||'_'||q.atid||'_'||qt.iscon and eq.eid=#{ei_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where q.state!=2 and q.id = #{item.qid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

insert into exampaper_answer(aid,content,qid,atid,aorder,content_6,eid,score) select a.id,a.content,a.qid,a.atid,a.aorder,a.content_6,#{ei_id},a.score from answer_db a where a.qid in
#{item.qid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

insert into exampaper_questiontype (EID, QTID, QUESTIONCOUNT, SCORE, ANSWERTIME, QTORDER,QTNAME,QTDESC,ISCON,ATID) select res.*,qt.qtname,qt.qtdesc,qt.iscon,qt.atid from (select #{eid}, eq.qtid, count(*), avg(score), -1, 1 from exampaper_question_db eq where ismain='0' and eid = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} group by qtid) res
left join exampaper_questiontype qt on res.qtid=qt.qtid and qt.eid=#{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

insert into exampaper_questionparam (EID, QTID, THID, THLEVEL, NUM,iscon) select #{eid}, eq.qtid, eq.theme1id, 1, count(eq.qid),eq.iscon from exampaper_question_db eq where eq.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and eq.ismain = 0 group by eq.theme1id, eq.qtid,eq.iscon
mapper.select: select eq.qid as qid,eq.th as th from exampaper_question_db eq where eq.ismain=0 and eq.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and (eq.score is null or eq.score<= 0) order by eq.th

select eqt.qtname as qtname, count(eq.qid) as count, sum(eq.score) as score, eq.qtid from exampaper_question_db eq left join exampaper_questiontype eqt on eq.qtid=eqt.qtid and eqt.eid=#{ei_id,jdbcType=NVARCHAR} where eq.eid = #{ei_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and eq.ismain=0 group by eq.qtid, eqt.qtname, eqt.qtorder order by eqt.qtorder

select count(eq.qid) as qcount, round(sum(eq.score),2) as score, t1.id as thid, eq.qtid as qtid from exampaper_question_db eq left join theme t1 on t1.id = eq.theme1id where eq.eid = #{ei_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and eq.cid = #{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and eq.ismain=0 group by t1.id, eq.qtid

select count(eq.qid) as qcount, round(sum(eq.score),2) as score, t1.id as thid, eq.qtid as qtid from exampaper_question_db eq left join theme t1 on t1.id = eq.theme1id or t1.id = eq.theme2id or t1.id = eq.theme3id where eq.eid = #{ei_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and eq.cid = #{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and eq.ismain=0 group by t1.id, eq.qtid

select qt.qtid as qtid, qt.qtname as qtname from exampaper_questiontype qt where exists (select * from exampaper_question_db eq where qt.qtid = eq.qtid and eq.cid=#{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and eq.eid = #{ei_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) and qt.eid = #{ei_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by qt.qtid

select a.aid as aid, a.content as acontent, a.atid as atid, a.content_6 as content_6, a.score as score from exampaper_answer a where a.qid = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and a.eid=#{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by a.aid

select eq.qid as qid, eq.mqid as mqid, eq.ismain as ismain, eq.answerid as answerid, eq.answerexplain as exp, eq.answertime as answertime, eq.answertime_bachelor as answertime_b, eq.distinction as distinction, eq.standard_deviation as standardDeviation, eq.realdifficulty as realdifficulty, eq.num as num, eq.content as content, eq.arrangeid as aid, eq.cognitionid as cid, eq. difficultyid as did, eq.knowledgeid as kid, eq.filepath as filepath, eq.atid as atid, qt.qtname as qtname, qt.xxdf, s.name as soname, t1.name as t1name, t2.name as t2name, t3.name as t3name, ct.real_name as creator, q.verifyname as verifyname, q.creatorname as creatorname, q.updatorname as updatorname, vt.real_name as verify, ut.real_name as updator from exampaper_question_db eq left join question_db q on eq.qid = q.id left join teacher ct on ct.id = eq.creatorid left join teacher vt on vt.id = eq.verifyid left join teacher ut on ut.id = eq.updatorid left join theme t1 on eq.theme1id = t1.id left join theme t2 on eq.theme2id = t2.id left join theme t3 on eq.theme3id = t3.id left join exampaper_questiontype qt on qt.qtid = eq.qtid and qt.eid=#{eid} left join source s on s.id = eq.sourceid where eq.qid = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and eq.eid=#{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select eq.qid as qid, eq.iscon as qtiscon, eq.mqid as mqid, eq.state as state, qt.atid as atid, eq.content as content, eq.answertime_bachelor as answertime, eq.answerid as answerid, eq.answerexplain as exp, eq.distinction as distinction, eq.standard_deviation as standardDeviation, eq.realdifficulty as realdifficulty, eq.num as num, eq.filepath as filepath from exampaper_question_db eq left join exampaper_questiontype qt on eq.qtid=qt.qtid and qt.eid=#{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where eq.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and eq.qid in (select q.qid from exampaper_question_db q where q.mqid = #{mqid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and q.eid=#{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

select eqq.qid as qid, eqq.mqid as mqid, eqq.cid as cid, eqq.ismain as ismain, eqq.iscon as iscon, eqq.atid as atid from exampaper_question_db eqq, (select eq.qid, lag(eq.qid, 1, null) over(order by eq.qorder,eq.qid) as last from exampaper_question_db eq where eq.ismain=0 and eq.eid =#{e_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) c where eqq.qid = c.last and eqq.eid = #{e_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and c.qid=#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select eqq.qid as qid, eqq.mqid as mqid, eqq.cid as cid, eqq.ismain as ismain, eqq.iscon as iscon, eqq.atid as atid from exampaper_question_db eqq, (select eq.qid, lead(eq.qid, 1, null) over(order by eq.qorder,eq.qid) as last from exampaper_question_db eq where eq.ismain=0 and eq.eid =#{e_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) c where eqq.qid = c.last and eqq.eid = #{e_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and c.qid=#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert: insert into exampaper_answer(aid,content,qid,atid,aorder,content_6,eid,score) select A.* from ( select a.id,a.content,a.qid,a.atid,a.aorder,a.content_6,#{item.EID},a.score from answer_db a where a.qid=#{item.ID,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) A
mapper.update: update examinfo ei set ei.subjectsum=(select count(*) from exampaper_question_db eq where eq.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and eq.ismain = 0) where ei.id = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
update examinfo ei set ei.subjectsum=0 where ei.id = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: select ca.aid as aid,ca.aname as aname from course_arrangement ca where ca.aid=#{aid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and ca.cid=#{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select cc.coid as cid,cc.coname as cname from course_cognition cc where cc.coid=#{coid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and cc.cid=#{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select cd.did as did,cd.dname as dname from course_difficulty cd where cd.did=#{did,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and cd.cid=#{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select ck.kid as kid,ck.kname as kname from course_knowledge ck where ck.kid = #{kid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and ck.cid=#{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select id as answertimeid,name as answertime from SYSTEM_TIME where id = #{answertimeid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select eq.qid as qid, eq.cid as cid, eq.mqid as mqid, eq.ismain as ismain, eq.iscon as iscon, eq.state as state, eq.answerid as answerid, eq.answerexplain as exp, eq.answertime as answertime, eq.answertime_bachelor as answertime_b, eq.distinction as distinction, eq.standard_deviation as standardDeviation, eq.realdifficulty as realdifficulty, eq.num as num, eq.content as content, eq.filepath as filepath, eq.qtid as qtid, qt.qtname as qtname, qt.xxdf as xxdf, s.id as soid, s.name as soname, eq.arrangeid as aid, eq.cognitionid as coid, eq. difficultyid as did, eq.knowledgeid as kid, eq.atid as atid, t1.id as t1id, t1.name as t1name, t2.id as t2id, t2.name as t2name, t3.id as t3id, t3.name as t3name from exampaper_question_db eq
left join theme t1 on eq.theme1id = t1.id left join theme t2 on eq.theme2id = t2.id left join theme t3 on eq.theme3id = t3.id left join exampaper_questiontype qt on eq.qtid = qt.qtid and qt.eid=#{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} left join source s on eq.sourceid = s.id where eq.qid =#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and eq.eid=#{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select cid from exampaper_question_db where qid=#{qid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and eid=#{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update:
update exampaper_answer
content = #{answer_content,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
atid = #{answertype},
content_6 = #{answer_content_6,jdbcType=CLOB},
score = #{score},
where eid = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and qid = #{qid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and aid=#{aid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: select eqt.qtid as qtid, eqt.qtname as qtname, eqt.e_qtname as e_qtname, eqt.qtdesc as qtdesc, eqt.e_qtdesc as e_qtdesc, eqt.sxb as sxb, eqt.xxdf as xxdf, eqt.mediaset as mediaset from exampaper_questiontype eqt where eqt.eid = #{ei_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by eqt.qtorder

select distinct tb.tname,eqt.qtid,eqt.qtname,eqt.iscon from (select concat(concat(concat(concat(t1.name, '/'), t2.name), '/'),t3.name) as tname,eq.qtid from exampaper_question_db eq left join theme t1 on t1.id = eq.theme1id left join theme t2 on t2.id = eq.theme2id left join theme t3 on t3.id = eq.theme3id where eq.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) tb,exampaper_questiontype eqt where tb.qtid=eqt.qtid and eqt.eid=#{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by tname
mapper.delete: delete from STUDENT_EXAM_Exam where eid=#{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
delete from STUDENT_EXAM where eid=#{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
delete from STUDENT_ANSWER_QUESTION_Exam where eid=#{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
delete from STUDENT_ANSWER_QUESTION where eid=#{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
delete from STUDENT_ANSWER_QTYPE_EXAM where eid=#{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
delete from STUDENT_ANSWER_QUESTIONTYPE where eid=#{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
delete from STUDENT_ANSWER_EXAM where eid=#{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
delete from STUDENT_ANSWER where eid=#{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
delete from EXAMOBJECT where eid=#{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
delete from EXAMPAPER_QUESTIONTYPE where eid=#{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
delete from EXAMPAPER_QUESTIONPARAM where eid=#{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
delete from EXAMPAPER_QUESTION_DB where eid=#{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
delete from EXAMPAPER_ANSWER where eid=#{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
delete from EXAMPAPER_COURSE where eid=#{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
delete from EXAMINFO where id=#{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: select mqid from exampaper_question_db q where q.iscon=1 and q.qid=#{qid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and q.eid=#{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert: insert when (not exists (select 1 from exampaper_question_db where qid = #{qid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and eid = #{ei_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) ) then into exampaper_question_db(qid,cid,iscon,mqid,ismain,answerid,verifyid,time4verify,answerexplain,answertime,realdifficulty, distinction,standard_deviation,difficultyid,knowledgeid,qtid,sourceid,cognitionid,arrangeid,theme1id,theme2id,theme3id,filepath,content, score,answertime_bachelor,difficultyid_bachelor,knowledgeid_bachelor,cognitionid_bachelor,state,creatorid,num,scount,atid,qtid_q,eid) select db.qid,db.cid,db.iscon,db.mqid,db.ismain,db.answerid,db.verifyid, db.time4verify,db.answerexplain,db.answertime,db.realdifficulty,db.distinction, db.standard_deviation,db.difficultyid,db.knowledgeid, nvl(substr(db.qtid,0,instr(db.qtid,'_')-1),db.qtid)||'_'||db.atid||'_'||db.iscon as qtid, db.sourceid,db.cognitionid, db.arrangeid,db.theme1id,db.theme2id,db.theme3id,db.filepath,db.content,db.score, db.answertime_bachelor,db.difficultyid_bachelor,db.knowledgeid_bachelor,db.cognitionid_bachelor,db.state,db.creatorid,q.num,db.scount,db.atid,db.qtid_q,#{ei_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR} from exampaper_question_db db left join question_db q on q.id=db.qid where db.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and db.qid = #{qid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: select sum(eq.answertime_bachelor) from exampaper_question_db eq where eq.ismain = 0 and eq.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select distinct ei.id, ei.ename, ei.cid, ei.cname, ei.begindate, ei.enddate, ei.teacherid, t.real_name as teachername, ei.unitid, ei.depid, ei.bid, ei.state, ei.autotest, ei.subjectsum, ei.bsum, ei.chosen, ei.aorb from
(select * from examinfo ei_1 where exists (select * from teacher_paper tp where exists (select * from (select distinct ec.eid as eid from exampaper_course ec,teacher_permission tp where ec.cid=tp.cid and tp.pid='32' and tp.tid=#{tid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) t where tp.eid=t.eid) and tp.pid = '31' and tp.tid = #{tid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and ei_1.id = tp.eid) union select * from examinfo ei_2 where ei_2.teacherid = #{tid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) ei
examinfo ei
left join teacher t on t.id = ei.teacherid where ei.state != -1
and ei.state in
#{item}
and ei.id in (select eo.eid from examobject eo where 1 = 1
and eo.grade in #{gid}
and eo.specialtyid in #{sid}
)
and (ei.id like '%'||#{num}||'%' or ei.ename like '%'||#{num}||'%')
and (
ei.id like '%' || #{num} || '%'
)
and (t.name like '%'||#{teacher}||'%' or t.real_name like '%'||#{teacher}||'%')
and ei.id in(select distinct(ec.eid) from exampaper_course ec where ec.cid=#{cid})
and ei.id in(select distinct(ec.eid) from exampaper_course ec where ec.cid in ( select c.id from course c where c.unitid in #{unid}))
order by ei.subjectsum desc
order by ei.begindate desc
order by ei.begindate desc

select count(res.id) as num from ( select distinct ei.id from
(select * from examinfo ei_1 where exists (select * from teacher_paper tp where exists (select * from (select distinct ec.eid as eid from exampaper_course ec,teacher_permission tp where ec.cid=tp.cid and tp.pid='32' and tp.tid=#{tid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) t where tp.eid=t.eid) and tp.pid = '31' and tp.tid = #{tid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and ei_1.id = tp.eid) union select * from examinfo ei_2 where ei_2.teacherid = #{tid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) ei
examinfo ei
left join teacher t on t.id = ei.teacherid where ei.state != -1
and ei.state in
#{item}
and ei.id in (select eo.eid from examobject eo where 1 = 1
and eo.grade in #{gid}
and eo.specialtyid in #{sid}
)
and (ei.id like '%'||#{num}||'%' or ei.ename like '%'||#{num}||'%')
and (
ei.id like '%' || #{num} || '%'
)
and (t.name like '%'||#{teacher}||'%' or t.real_name like '%'||#{teacher}||'%')
and ei.id in(select distinct(ec.eid) from exampaper_course ec where ec.cid=#{cid})
and ei.id in(select distinct(ec.eid) from exampaper_course ec where ec.cid in ( select c.id from course c where c.unitid in #{unid})) ) res

select distinct cid from exampaper_course where eid in

mapper.insert:

select q.qid as qid, q.iscon as qtiscon, cor.name_c as cname, q.content as content, q.mqid as mqid, q.answerid as answerid, q.answertime_bachelor as answertime, q.answerexplain as answerexplain, q.distinction as distinction, q.filepath as filepath, q.standard_deviation as standardDeviation, q.realdifficulty as realdifficulty, q.creatorid as creatorid, q.score as score, vt.name as verifyname, t.name as creatorname, vt.real_name as verifyrealname, t.real_name as creator, ut.real_name as updatorname, ut.name as updator, q.num as num, cc.name as coname, cd.name as dname, ck.name as kname, cs.name as soname, qt.qtname as qtname, qt.atid as atid, t1.name as t1name, t2.name as t2name, t3.name as t3name, q.th as th from exampaper_question_db q left join course cor on cor.id=q.cid left join teacher t on q.creatorid=t.id left join teacher vt on q.verifyid = vt.id left join teacher ut on q.updatorid = ut.id left join theme t1 on q.theme1id = t1.id left join theme t2 on q.theme2id = t2.id left join theme t3 on q.theme3id = t3.id left join cognition cc on q.cognitionid_bachelor = cc.id left join difficulty cd on q.difficultyid_bachelor = cd.id left join knowledge ck on q.knowledgeid_bachelor = ck.id left join source cs on q.sourceid = cs.id left join exampaper_questiontype qt on qt.qtid=q.qtid and qt.eid=q.eid where q.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and q.mqid = #{mqid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by to_number(q.qid)

select epq.qid as qid, epq.iscon as qtiscon, epq.mqid as mqid, epq.ismain as ismain, epq.iscon as iscon, epq.answertime_bachelor as time, epq.score as score, epq.qtid as qtype, epq.answerid as answerid, epq.content as content, epq.qorder as qorder, epq.filepath as filepath, epq.th as th, epq.atid as atid, a.aid as aid, a.content as acontent, a.content_6 as acontent_6, concat(concat(concat(concat(t1.name, '/'), t2.name), '/'),t3.name) as tname from exampaper_question_db epq left join theme t1 on t1.id = epq.theme1id left join theme t2 on t2.id = epq.theme2id left join theme t3 on t3.id = epq.theme3id left join exampaper_answer a on epq.qid = a.qid and epq.eid=a.eid left join exampaper_questiontype t on t.eid = epq.eid and t.qtid = epq.qtid where epq.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by epq.qorder,a.aid

and t.mobile in (1,3)
and t.mobile != 1

select ei.id as id, ei.cid as cid, ei.ename as ename, ei.cname as cname, ei.term as term, ei.time as time, ei.total as total, ei.type as type, ei.period as period, ei.aorb as aorb, TO_CHAR(ei.begindate, 'yyyy"年"MM"月') as examdate, t.name as termname, et.name as examtype, ei.score as score, s.name as examtime, sy.name as schoolyear from examinfo ei left join term t on t.id=ei.term left join examtype et on ei.type=et.id left join system_time s on s.id=ei.time left join schoolyear sy on sy.id=ei.schoolyear where ei.id =#{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

mapper.insert: insert into question_db(id,cid,mqid,qtiscon,ismain,answerexplain,answerid,addtime,difficultyid,knowledgeid,qtid,atid,arrangeid,sourceid, cognitionid,theme1id,theme2id,theme3id,creatorid,answertime,realdifficulty,num,distinction,cognitionid_bachelor,difficultyid_bachelor, knowledgeid_bachelor,answertime_bachelor,filepath,standard_deviation,score,content) select #{qid_new,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},cid,mqid,iscon,ismain,answerexplain,answerid,#{addtime},difficultyid,knowledgeid,qtid,atid,arrangeid,sourceid, cognitionid,theme1id,theme2id,theme3id,creatorid,answertime,realdifficulty,num,distinction,cognitionid_bachelor,difficultyid_bachelor, knowledgeid_bachelor,answertime_bachelor,filepath,standard_deviation,score,content from exampaper_question_db where qid=#{qid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and eid=#{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
